headline: Assessing PTC (PTC) Valuation After Its Cloud-Native Onshape Model-Based Definition Upgrade
summary: Why PTC (PTC) is in focus after its latest product move PTC (PTC) has attracted fresh attention after rolling out a fully cloud-native Model-Based Definition capability inside its Onshape CAD and PDM platform, directly tying manufacturing data to 3D product models. This update ties into the company’s broader push around digital product lifecycle software, giving investors a new development to weigh alongside PTC’s recent share performance and profitability metrics. See our latest analysis for...
